summary_pages.title: CAKE Payments Outages - 2018
summary_pages.text_preview: Overview Below is the list of CODE RED incidents that occurred due to an issue with the CAKE Payments product in 2018. Incidents # Date(IST) Issue JIRA Ticket Impact Root Cause Immediate Solution Long Term Solution Vantiv IBF Settlement verification failed while processing payout responses from Vantiv. Leapset JIRA Live 4342ca39-ddca-3f46-8b7f-554ba10b0eff DE-78225 There was no impact to the merchant payouts. The alert triggered falsely because this was due to a US holiday. The alert triggered f
tables: Vantiv IBF Settlement verification failed while processing payout responses from Vantiv.
There was no impact to the merchant payouts. The alert triggered falsely because this was due to a US holiday.
The alert triggered falsely because this was due to a US holiday.
Holiday schedule was updated to overcome such issues in future.
Leapset JIRA Live 4342ca39-ddca-3f46-8b7f-554ba10b0eff DE-79226 Leapset JIRA Live 4342ca39-ddca-3f46-8b7f-554ba10b0eff CT-9557
This was due to CDA been down at the time that this affected. CDA was restarted to fix the issue.
The issue was rectified after restarting the CDA instance.
Incident ([PROD] Payment Gateway Masterdb-1a Replication Status - pgnat.leapset.com )
This issue affected 4 merchants due to a PG DB sync issue which failed to capture some batches when the close cash
All failed transactions were retried manually and marked as captured.

summary_pages.title: CAKE Payments Outages - 2017
summary_pages.text_preview: Overview Below is the list of CODE RED incidents that occurred due to an issue with the CAKE Payments product in 2017. Incidents # Date (IST) Issue JIRA ticket Impact Root Cause Immediate Solution Long Term Solution 1 Scheduler Execution Failure Leapset JIRA Live 4342ca39-ddca-3f46-8b7f-554ba10b0eff PAY-514 Payout delayed Payments scheduler froze which resulted in none of the scheduled jobs executing. An alert was not triggered since the application was up and running although it did not execute
tables: Payments scheduler froze which resulted in none of the scheduled jobs executing. An alert was not triggered since the application was up and running although it did not execute the jobs.
The scheduler app froze. The scheduler jobs were manually executed by the payments dev team.
Add a mechanism for the application to send a ping/check every 10 minutes to gateway and trigger an alert in Slack if response is not received - Done
Failed transactions retried by Payments Team
Move out from multi master setup and write data only to one db server - Done
Due to the absence of an automated method to pause the scheduled jobs on bank holidays, Dev team paused the jobs for the 4th July holiday but didn't turn it back on the next week.
None. Merchants were informed that payouts will occur the next day.
